titleStmt.title: SII 18.160: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 160. (B.K. No. 71 of 1933-34.) NARAGUND, NARAGUND PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the raṅgamaṇḍapa of Saṅkaralinga temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalla Nūrmaḍi-Tailapa, records a grant of land, made for the purpose of feeding the poor, by Kuppaṭi Ēchiseṭṭi of Hēmamgēri, a quarter of Naṟugunda. Ēchiseṭṭi is stated to have been placed in charge of the mint (achchu) by the king and hence he was called Hēma-Kuppaṭi (i.e., a person casting gold-coins). Naṟugunda, its Mahājanas, the Hēmaṅgēri and its Mahājanas as well as Ēchiseṭṭi and his family are highly praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . kuṁdaprasūnadhavaḷairddaśanai saṁpaśya māturadhi kaṁ
cūcukōgraṁ naṁdasya vaktramavalōkayatō murārērmmaṁdasmitaṁ mamatanōtu manīṣitāni
śrīmaddēvēṁdralōkārccitapadakamaḷaṁ viśvalōkaikanāthaṁ sōmēśaṁ śankaraṁ śāśva tanamaranadīnīka
rākāratārārāmēṁduprāṁśusaṁśōbhitakabaḷajaṭājūṭanānaṁdalakṣmīdhāmaṁ kāruṇyadiṁ
māḍuge namage sukhāvāptiyaṁ dēvadēva . śrīmattailapacakri nannimahipāḷaṁ vikramānkaṁ mahīrāmē
śaṁ jayasiṁhanūrjjitayaśaṁ traiḷōkyamallaṁ jagadrāmaṁ tāṁ bhuvanaikanurvvipa varaṁ pe
rmmāḍi sōmēśvaraṁ bhūmīśaṁ jagadēkaniṁtu negarddarccāḷukyacakrēśvarar . jaḷadhipari
vritadharitrītaḷarājyamanēkacakradiṁdāḷda mahadbaḷarenipa cāḷukyānvayatiḷakaṁ
traiḷōkyamalla bhūpadiḷīpa . jaḷadhiparītabhūsudatīkuntaḷadantesedoppi tōrppa
kuṁtaḷamahiyoḷu virājisuva beḷvaladānanaveṁba permmeyaṁ taḷadesevagrahā ra
tiḷakaṁ naṟuguṁdamadentu nōrpaḍaṁ kuḷiśadharāvanītaḷadavolu vibudhā śrayamī dharitri
yoḷu . jaḷanidhiyaṁdadiṁdeseva pūrṇnataṭākanikāyadiṁ sudhājaḷadharapūrṇnakūpa tatiyiṁ
phaḷabhāravinamnabhūjasaṁkuḷadinakṣayaṁ beḷeva keyivoladiṁda manūnalakṣmiyaṁ taḷedati
vettesevudā naṟuguṁdamiḷātaḷāgradoḷu . Anupamadēvatābhavanamāḷegaḷiṁdatira
myabhāvadiṁdanimiṣasaudhadaṁteseva harmmyanikāyadiniṁdrakāminījanadavoloppamaṁ taḷada kāṁte
yariṁde gurūpamāna sajjanadiṁ dhanēśanaṁ naguva vaiśyarinā naṟuguṁdamoppuguṁ . śrutiravara
myavipragrihasaṁkuḷadiṁda purāṇasādhaka pra ninā sevasatsa maya dimanēkata
vistritapadabhāvalakṣaṇavicakṣaṇa vakhkhaṇa ḷiyiṁ nutavividhāgnihōtraniḷayāva
ḷiyiṁ naṟuguṁdamoppugu . śrīmadhusūdana jalaruhasaṁbhava śaṁkaranante rugyaju
ssāmanikāyadante naranāgasurādhipalōkadante lakṣmimahimōnnatiprabhuteyiṁ naṟuguṁda
da kērigaḷu samantī mahiyoḷvirājisuvuvu viśrutakīrttigaḷudghaśāligaḷu . Ā kēri trayade
śōbhisuva hēvagēri lōkaṁgaḷoḷu nākaṁ vēdanikāyadoḷu negardda rugvēdaṁ surānīkadoḷu śrī
kāntaṁ sale śōbhipantesevudaṁtā kēriyoḷu śaṁkara śrīkāntarnnelisirppareṁduvada ḻindākēri lōka
. dhavaḷē śāṁghṛpa yōjabhriṁgaramaḷaśrīvīra nārāyaṇāṁghriviśēśārccanatatu pararbhbhagavatīpada
padmārādhakarbhbhuvanaprastutakīrttigaḷu vividhavidyāpāragarśrīvadhūdhavaraṁtā naṟuguṁda
prabhugaḷiṁnūṟirppadiṁbaru . viditakaḷākaḷāparanavadyaguṇaugharanūnadānasaṁpada
rucitajñarūrjjitayaśōrtthigaḷārjjitapuṇyasaṁcayaramaḷakīrttigaḷu vibudhalōkasa
māśrayakalpabhūjareṁbudu dhare hēmagēriya dharāmararaṁ prabhuśaktiyu
ktara . Avarayvattayvareṁbī pesaroḷeseva saujanyaratunākararbhbhāvavidarssiṣṭēṣṭacintā maṇiga
ḷa nupamācārarāviśvalōkastavarinnūṟurppadiṁbarpprabhusabheyoḷagaṁtagrapū
jādhikārappravararttāveṁba peṁpaṁ taḷeda vibhumahābhāgarādityatējaru . © . svasti samastabhuvanā
śraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyavallanūrmmaḍitaila
padēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ sa
luttamiralā naṟuguṁdada hēmaṁgēriyoḷ kappaṭiyēciseṭṭiyanvayameṁteṁdaḍe .
śrīmadanupamaguṇaughalalāmaṁ viśrutayaśōrtthi budhajanavinutādhāmaṁ nijā
nvayārṇnavasōmaṁ mahadēvaseṭṭi negarddaṁ dhareyoḷu . Ātana kulasati viśrutagōtra
je guṇavati viḷāsavati patihitadoḷu sītege doreyene negarddaḷu bhūtaḷadoḷu dē
vakabbe vanitāratna . Ā mithunaṁgaḷugādaṁ śrīmahitaṁ putranamaḷakīrttivadhūṭīdhāmane
ne negarddananupamanī mahiyoḷagayṭiseṭṭi mānavaratuna . paṭu niśśāṭhyananūnadā
navibhavaṁ dharmmakriyāsaṁgalaṁpaṭanaccaṁ naḍasalke yōgyanivaneṁdā pārikāyāya
maṁ paṭahadhvānadināḷdanīye tanagaṁdindittanā hēmakuppaṭiyeṁbī pesarayciseṭṭi
gesedatteṁduṁ dharābhāgadoḷu . Ā vineyanidhiya vallabhe bhāvisala
marāpagāṁganāratnadavolu sadbhāvaviḷāsadinesevaḷu bhūvaḷeyadoḷanaghe malli
kabbe nitānta . Ene negardda mallikabbegamanupamaguṇase suvayciseṭṭigamādaṁ taneyaṁ
nijavamśōttamaneniparjjunaseṭṭi vibudhajanasaṁstutya . Ātana taṁmanāśritaja
nāmarabhūruhaneṁba peṁpuvettātatakīrtti dhārmmikajanāgraṇi viśrutavaṁśa
vikhyātananūnasaṁpadanegartteyoḷā dhanadaṁge tāṁ migilu bhūtaḷadoḷu viśiṣṭa guṇaneṁbu
dukuppaṭiyēciseṭṭiya . nuḍiyoḷu śaucadoḷōjeyoḷuniyamadoḷu saujanyado
ḷu dānadoḷu naḍeyoḷu sāhasadoḷu viśiṣṭaguṇadoḷu sauṁdaryyasaṁpattiyoḷu
mriḍapādārccanabhaktiyoḷu parahitavyāpāradoḷudharmmajaṁ gaḍa tāṁ kuppaṭiyēci
seṭṭiyenalinnārddannyarātaṁbara . Ā vineyāṁburāśiya kulāṁgane viśrutacāruvri
tte bhūdēvapadābjabhakte patibhakte guṇānvite gojjikabbeyaṁtā vadhugēciseṭṭigamanūna
guṇaṁ sutanādaneṁdu sadbhāvade dhātri kīrttipudu cauḍaṇanaṁ kamanīyarū
pana . raṁbhetiḷōttamūrvvaśiyarannarenalu dhareguṁtu bhāvisalu raṁbhetilōtta mōrvvaśiya
rapparakāṁteyaraṁnyakīrttanālaṁbadoḷēno viśvajanasaṁstute cārucaritre sadguṇā laṁbiniyē
ciseṭṭiya tanūbhaveyeṁbudu jakkaṇabbeyaṁ . paḍedartthaṁ dvijadēvatāprakaradānā
nūnapūjārtthamādaḍe saukhyānvitanappenalladaḍe dāridrānvitāyāsadoḷu toḍarvve
tappadideṁdu hēmara padāṁbhōjārccanaṁ māḍi tāṁ paḍedaṁ mānyamanēciseṭṭi daśasaṁ
khyākaṁgaḷaṁ mattara . paḍedā goṇneyageyya saṁsthaḷada mattarppattaṟoḷu biṭṭapaṁ baḍavarggaṁ
namanikkalaydu viśikhānīkaṁgaḷaṁ bhaktiyoḷu toḍarddā śaṁkaradēvatā
rccanegavayduṁ mattaraṁ hēmarāḷu mriḍanāḷu kuppaṭiyēciseṭṭiyadaṟiṁdāta ṁge bha
draṁ jaya . © dānaṁ vāContinuation is
Digital edition of SII 18.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
